scripts.dev:kill: fuser -k 10000/tcp && fuser -k 10001/tcp && fuser -k 10002/tcp && fuser -k 10003/tcp && fuser -k 10004/tcp && fuser -k 10005/tcp
scripts.dev: concurrently -n LOBBY,QUIZ,TABOO,UNO,SKYJOW,YAHTZEE "npm run dev:lobby" "npm run dev:quiz" "npm run dev:taboo" "npm run dev:uno" "npm run dev:skyjow" "npm run dev:yahtzee"
